title: Altensteinia nubigena
intro: Altensteinia nubigena is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae, commonly found in the Himalayas. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to its bioactive constituents such as iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The bioactive constituents of Altensteinia nubigena, including altenal and gentianine, have been reported to have antioxidant, antimicrobial, and hepatoprotective properties. Altensteinia nubigena is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties.
